auth.otpEmailBody:
Hi there,

Your SITES.BD verification code is: {{code}}

This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you did not request it, please ignore this email.

— SITES.BD
auth.otpEmailHtml:
Hi there,

Your SITES.BD verification code is:

{{code}}

This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you did not request it, please ignore this email.

— SITES.BD
auth.forgotPasswordEmailBody:
Hi there,

We received a request to reset your SITES.BD password. Use the verification code below to continue:

{{code}}

This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you did not request a reset, please ignore this email.

— SITES.BD
auth.forgotPasswordEmailHtml:
Hi there,

We received a request to reset your SITES.BD password. Use the verification code below to continue:

{{code}}

This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you did not request a reset, please ignore this email.

— SITES.BD
auth.welcomeEmailBody:
Hi {{name}},

Welcome to SITES.BD! Your account is ready.

You can now claim a free subdomain on sites.bd, esite.top or esite.in and point it anywhere you like.

— SITES.BD

errors.otpExpired: OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.otpNotFound: No verification code was requested. Please request a new one.
errors.mobileTaken: This mobile number is already registered.
errors.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to continue.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.profileIncomplete: Please complete your profile before continuing.
errors.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
errors.loginRateLimited: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.immutableField: This field cannot be changed. Please contact support to update it.
